title: GitHub - open-and-async/mcp: Model Context Protocol server for the book Open and Async — async-first method tools plus the book's outline, taglines, and summaries. Ships the method, never the manuscript.
excerpt: Model Context Protocol server for the book Open and Async — async-first method tools plus the book's outline, taglines, and summaries. Ships the method, never the manuscript. - open-and-async/mcp
content_html:
Bring async-first working practices into your editor and AI assistant. This Model Context Protocol server gives your AI the tools to draft a decision doc, turn a meeting into an async artifact, pressure-test a status update, or settle a sync-vs-async debate — without leaving the tools you already work in.

It's the method from Open and Async — the collaborative software-development playbook for remote and distributed teams — as working tools, not reading.

What you can do with it

  • Stop writing decision docs from a blank page. Hand your AI the decision and the options; get back a structured ADR scaffold — context, tradeoffs, the call, and how reversible it is.
  • Turn "let's hop on a call" into an artifact. Give it a meeting's purpose and agenda; get the async equivalent with an owner and a deadline.
  • Ship status updates that don't blindside anyone. Score a draft against the "work loudly / no surprises" rubric and get concrete fixes before you post it.
  • Settle sync vs. async in seconds. Describe the task; get a recommendation and the rule behind it.
  • Run a standup without a meeting. Drop in a structured async-standup template your team can adopt today.
  • Win the "async is too slow" argument. Map common objections to a ready reframe, pull role-aware guidance, or search the book's principles — each answer cited and linked.
  • Get coached end to end. Run the coach prompt with a situation and it triages sync vs. async, generates the right artifact, adds role guidance, and caps with a shareable line — one composed answer, or a nudge to just have the conversation when that's the better call.

Install

Claude Code:

claude mcp add open-async -- npx -y @open-and-async/mcp

Claude Desktop (claude_desktop_config.json):

{
  "mcpServers": {
    "open-async": {
      "command": "npx",
      "args": ["-y", "@open-and-async/mcp"]
    }
  }
}

Any MCP client that speaks stdio works the same way: run npx @open-and-async/mcp.

The toolbox

Method tools — pure utility, use them on any project

Tool What it does
draft_decision_doc Decision + options → a structured ADR/decision-doc scaffold (context, options, tradeoffs, decision, reversibility).
convert_meeting_to_async Meeting purpose/agenda → the async equivalent (artifact, owner, deadline).
score_status_update Scores a draft update against the "work loudly / no surprises" rubric and suggests fixes.
run_async_standup A structured async-standup template a team can adopt.
triage_sync_vs_async Recommends sync vs async for a task, with the decision rule.

Reference tools — the book's thinking, on demand

Tool What it does
book_outline Sections + chapters + one-line TL;DRs. The map.
get_chapter_summary A chapter's TL;DR + taglines + read-the-chapter link.
search_principles Keyword search over the summary corpus; short cited snippets.
handle_objection Maps skepticism ("async is slow") to the book's reframe.
get_guidance Role-aware (manager/ic) guidance for a topic.
get_taglines Taglines + their /q/<slug> quote-card URLs.

Resources

  • book://outline — sections, chapters, TL;DRs (JSON)
  • book://taglines — taglines + quote-card URLs (JSON)
  • book://about — what this server is, what it does and doesn't contain, and where to get the book

Prompts

Invoke these directly from your client (e.g. as slash commands):

  • coach — the full method on one situation. Triages sync vs. async, generates the right artifact, enriches with role guidance, and caps with a shareable tagline — one composed deliverable. Stops and recommends a real-time conversation when the situation genuinely needs one.
  • async-standup, write-adr, meeting-to-issue, weekly-update — parameterized templates for a single task.

Good to know

It's a real tool, not a paywall. The method tools work on their own — no book required. The reference tools answer from the book's already-public summaries and a paraphrased framework layer, always capped and always cited so you can trace any snippet to its chapter. The "get the book" link surfaces about once per session, not on every line — it's a tool, not an ad. No verbatim book prose is bundled (the only data file is data/book.json.br), so what you install is genuinely useful, not a teaser.

Staying current. data/book.json.br ships with a version that tracks the book's edition, so the server can tell you which edition it's based on and re-sync when a new one lands.

Generated output is a template, not the author speaking. The method tools format your input into decision docs, standups, and triage calls. That output is generated guidance to adapt — it is not a personal statement, quote, or endorsement by Ben Balter or Open & Async LLC, and shouldn't be presented as one. Reference-tool snippets are summaries the tool cites back to the book, not verbatim prose.

Licensing

This package is split-licensed — see LICENSE for the overview:

  • Code (everything under src/) — MIT.
  • Data (data/book.json.br) — proprietary; © Open & Async LLC. You may use it only as part of running this software. No redistribution as a standalone dataset, no derivative datasets, no model training. See DATA-LICENSE.md.

The full work — the stories, the voice, the complete argument — lives in the book: open-and-async.com.

blocks.html_en: Bring async-first working practices into your editor and AI assistant. This Model Context Protocol server gives your AI the tools to draft a decision doc, turn a meeting into an async artifact, pressure-test a status update, or settle a sync-vs-async debate — without leaving the tools you already work in.

sentences.en: Bring async-first working practices into your editor and AI assistant.
sentences.zh: 将异步优先的工作实践引入您的编辑器和 AI 助手中。

sentences.en: This Model Context Protocol server gives your AI the tools to draft a decision doc, turn a meeting into an async artifact, pressure-test a status update, or settle a sync-vs-async debate — without leaving the tools you already work in.
sentences.zh: 该模型上下文协议服务器为您的 AI 提供了起草决策文档、将会议转变为异步工件、对状态更新进行压力测试或解决同步与异步争论的工具，而无需离开您已经使用的工具。

blocks.html_en: It's the method from Open and Async — the collaborative software-development playbook for remote and distributed teams — as working tools, not reading.

sentences.en: It's the method from Open and Async — the collaborative software-development playbook for remote and distributed teams — as working tools, not reading.
sentences.zh: 这是《Open and Async》（面向远程和分布式团队的协作软件开发手册）中的方法，作为工作工具，而不是阅读。

blocks.html_en: What you can do with it

sentences.en: What you can do with it
sentences.zh: 你可以用它做什么

blocks.html_en: • Stop writing decision docs from a blank page. Hand your AI the decision and the options; get back a structured ADR scaffold — context, tradeoffs, the call, and how reversible it is.

sentences.en: Stop writing decision docs from a blank page.
sentences.zh: 停止从空白页编写决策文档。

sentences.en: Hand your AI the decision and the options; get back a structured ADR scaffold — context, tradeoffs, the call, and how reversible it is.
sentences.zh: 把决定和选项交给你的人工智能；得到一个结构化的 ADR 支架——背景、权衡、调用以及它的可逆性。

blocks.html_en: • Turn "let's hop on a call" into an artifact. Give it a meeting's purpose and agenda; get the async equivalent with an owner and a deadline.

sentences.en: Turn "let's hop on a call" into an artifact.
sentences.zh: 将“让我们接听电话”变成一件神器。

sentences.en: Give it a meeting's purpose and agenda; get the async equivalent with an owner and a deadline.
sentences.zh: 确定会议的目的和议程； get the async equivalent with an owner and a deadline.

blocks.html_en: • Ship status updates that don't blindside anyone. Score a draft against the "work loudly / no surprises" rubric and get concrete fixes before you post it.

sentences.en: Ship status updates that don't blindside anyone.
sentences.zh: 发送状态更新不会让任何人措手不及。

sentences.en: Score a draft against the "work loudly / no surprises" rubric and get concrete fixes before you post it.
sentences.zh: 根据“大声工作/毫无意外”的准则打出草稿，并在发布之前获得具体的修复。

blocks.html_en: • Settle sync vs. async in seconds. Describe the task; get a recommendation and the rule behind it.

sentences.en: Settle sync vs. async in seconds.
sentences.zh: 在几秒钟内解决同步与异步问题。

sentences.en: Describe the task; get a recommendation and the rule behind it.
sentences.zh: 描述任务；获得建议及其背后的规则。

blocks.html_en: • Run a standup without a meeting. Drop in a structured async-standup template your team can adopt today.

sentences.en: Run a standup without a meeting.
sentences.zh: 在没有会议的情况下举办站立会议。

sentences.en: Drop in a structured async-standup template your team can adopt today.
sentences.zh: 添加您的团队今天可以采用的结构化异步站立模板。

blocks.html_en: • Win the "async is too slow" argument. Map common objections to a ready reframe, pull role-aware guidance, or search the book's principles — each answer cited and linked.

sentences.en: Win the "async is too slow" argument.
sentences.zh: 赢得“异步太慢”的争论。

sentences.en: Map common objections to a ready reframe, pull role-aware guidance, or search the book's principles — each answer cited and linked.
sentences.zh: 将常见的反对意见映射到现成的重构中，提取角色意识指导，或搜索本书的原则 - 每个答案都被引用和链接。

blocks.html_en: • Get coached end to end. Run the coach prompt with a situation and it triages sync vs. async, generates the right artifact, adds role guidance, and caps with a shareable line — one composed answer, or a nudge to just have the conversation when that's the better call.

sentences.en: Get coached end to end.
sentences.zh: 接受端到端的指导。

sentences.en: Run the coach prompt with a situation and it triages sync vs. async, generates the right artifact, adds role guidance, and caps with a shareable line — one composed answer, or a nudge to just have the conversation when that's the better call.
sentences.zh: 根据情况运行教练提示，它会分类同步与异步，生成正确的工件，添加角色指导，并以可共享的台词作为上限 - 一个完整的答案，或者在更好的通话时轻推进行对话。

That output is generated guidance to adapt — it is not a personal statement, quote, or endorsement by Ben Balter or Open & Async LLC, and shouldn't be presented as one. Reference-tool snippets are summaries the tool cites back to the book, not verbatim prose.

content_html_zh:
将异步优先的工作实践引入您的编辑器和 AI 助手中。 该模型上下文协议服务器为您的 AI 提供了起草决策文档、将会议转变为异步工件、对状态更新进行压力测试或解决同步与异步争论的工具，而无需离开您已经使用的工具。

这是《Open and Async》（面向远程和分布式团队的协作软件开发手册）中的方法，作为工作工具，而不是阅读。

你可以用它做什么

  • 停止从空白页编写决策文档。 把决定和选项交给你的人工智能；得到一个结构化的 ADR 支架——背景、权衡、调用以及它的可逆性。
  • 将“让我们接听电话”变成一件神器。 确定会议的目的和议程； get the async equivalent with an owner and a deadline.
  • 发送状态更新不会让任何人措手不及。 根据“大声工作/毫无意外”的准则打出草稿，并在发布之前获得具体的修复。
  • 在几秒钟内解决同步与异步问题。 描述任务；获得建议及其背后的规则。
  • 在没有会议的情况下举办站立会议。 添加您的团队今天可以采用的结构化异步站立模板。
  • 赢得“异步太慢”的争论。 将常见的反对意见映射到现成的重构中，提取角色意识指导，或搜索本书的原则 - 每个答案都被引用和链接。
  • 接受端到端的指导。 根据情况运行教练提示，它会分类同步与异步，生成正确的工件，添加角色指导，并以可共享的台词作为上限 - 一个完整的答案，或者在更好的通话时轻推进行对话。

安装

克劳德代码：

claude mcp add open-async -- npx -y @open-and-async/mcp

克劳德桌面（claude_desktop_config.json）：

{
  "mcpServers": {
    "open-async": {
      "command": "npx",
      "args": ["-y", "@open-and-async/mcp"]
    }
  }
}

任何使用 stdio 的 MCP 客户端都以相同的方式工作：运行 npx @open-and-async/mcp。

工具箱

方法工具——纯粹的实用工具，可在任何项目中使用它们

Tool 它的作用
草案决定_doc 决策 + 选项 → 结构化 ADR/决策文档支架（背景、选项、权衡、决策、可逆性）。
将会议转换为异步 会议目的/议程 → 异步等价物（工件、所有者、截止日期）。
分数状态更新 根据“大声工作/没有惊喜”的准则对草稿进行更新，并提出修复建议。
运行异步站立 团队可以采用的结构化异步站立模板。
分类同步与异步 根据决策规则推荐任务的同步与异步。

参考工具——书本思维，按需定制

Tool 它的作用
书本大纲 章节 + 章节 + 一行 TL;DR。 地图。
获取章节摘要 章节的 TL;DR + 标语 + 阅读章节链接。
搜索原则 摘要语料库中的关键词搜索；引用的简短片段。
处理对象 将怀疑论（“异步很慢”）映射到本书的重构中。
获取指导 主题的角色感知（经理/ic）指南。
获取标语 标语 + 他们的 /q/<slug> 引用卡 URL。

资源

  • book://outline — 章节、章节、TL;DR (JSON)
  • book://taglines — 标语 + 引用卡 URL (JSON)
  • book://about — 这台服务器是什么、它包含什么、不包含什么以及从哪里获取这本书

提示

直接从您的客户端调用它们（例如作为斜杠命令）：

  • coach——针对一种情况的完整方法。 对同步与异步进行分类，生成正确的工件，通过角色指导进行丰富，并以可共享的口号为上限——一个由可交付成果组成的。 当情况确实需要实时对话时，停止并建议进行实时对话。
  • async-standup、write-adr、会议发布、每周更新 — 单个任务的参数化模板。

很高兴知道

这是一个真正的工具，而不是付费专区。 这些方法工具可以自行发挥作用——无需书籍。 参考工具从本书已经公开的摘要和解释的框架层中进行回答，始终加盖并始终引用，以便您可以跟踪任何片段到其章节。 “获取这本书”链接大约每次会话都会出现一次，而不是每行都会出现一次——它是一个工具，而不是广告。 没有捆绑逐字的书籍散文（唯一的数据文件是 data/book.json.br），因此您安装的内容确实有用，而不是预告片。

保持最新状态。 data/book.json.br 附带一个跟踪书籍版本的版本，因此服务器可以告诉您它基于哪个版本，并在新版本登陆时重新同步。

生成的输出是一个模板，不是作者说的。 方法工具将您的输入格式化为决策文档、站立会议和分类电话。 该输出是生成的适应指南 - 它不是 Ben Balter 或 Open & Async LLC 的个人陈述、引述或认可，也不应作为其中之一呈现。 参考工具片段是该工具引用回书中的摘要，而不是逐字散文。

许可

该软件包是分割许可的——请参阅许可证了解概述：

  • 代码（src/下的所有内容）——MIT。
  • 数据 (data/book.json.br) — 专有； © 开放与异步有限责任公司。 您只能将其用作运行该软件的一部分。 没有作为独立数据集重新分配，没有衍生数据集，没有模型训练。 请参阅数据许可证.md。

完整的作品——故事、声音、完整的论点——都在书中：open-and-async.com。
